behaviors.reasoning: Valid markdown JSON parse success must be verified through parser + hook-input handling integration, not isolated utility behavior only.
Trace emission on malformed input spans parser failure handling and trace writer integration.
Mapping parser failure into a handled internal error path is local policy logic.
Non-crashing process behavior with trace emission on malformed stdin must be validated at real process boundary.
Real stdin-to-trace artifact flow requires subprocess/file-system boundaries that in-process mocks can miss.
Disambiguating malformed JSON vs valid markdown uses test harness + parser behavior across representative fixtures.
